title: Signor Baffo
description: An interactive children’s show, Signor Baffo opens his restaurant to children aged 3+. There’s chaos in the kitchen when Signor Baffo is left in charge. Expect plates-full of fun, with generous helpings of silliness, mischief and adventure. What's the best way to mix meatballs with spaghetti? How do you make a chicken lay an egg, and how does a sausage roll? All is revealed in the charming culinary chaos of Signor Baffo's kitchen. Winner – Best Kids & Family Award, Adelaide Fringe 2025
